capabilities: Combine systematic hypothesis generation with AI prompting to enhance reasoning capabilities and streamline hypothesis validation.

procedure.action: Extract key insights from both 'Systematic Testable Hypothesis Generation' and 'AI Prompting' knowledge bases using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke a graph-based tool like Neo4j to map relationships and identify overlapping concepts between the two knowledge bases by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Reconcile artifacts by creating a unified workflow using a tool like Apache NiFi to automate data flow between the two systems by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.
Run validation scripts using PyTest to ensure the merged output maintains integrity and expected results.

Utilize a machine learning model, such as a classifier in scikit-learn, to detect candidate hypotheses from the merged data using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assign results using a decision tree algorithm to determine the validity and relevance of each hypothesis using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.

summary: Integrate systematic hypothesis generation with AI prompting by merging insights from both knowledge bases, aligning workflows, and validating outputs.
title: Systematic Testable Hypothesis Generation with AI Prompting

failureConditions: Merged output lacks coherence, leading to invalid hypotheses.
Overlapping concepts are not correctly identified, causing redundant workflows.

Validation scripts fail, resulting in undetected errors in hypothesis generation; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: Check that the merged workflow produces coherent hypotheses in 95% of test cases
Ensure validation scripts pass with no errors in 100% of test runs
Verify that candidate detection identifies relevant hypotheses in at least 90% of cases
